Safaricom services have been experiencing instability and slowness today. While some payments are going through successfully, callbacks are not being received consistently to confirm payments. In some cases, the STK Push does not prompt customers to enter their PIN at all. Response times are also unusually slow, further affecting transaction completion.

The error response below  from safaricom indicates a temporary service outage on Safaricom’s side, and retries may be required until the service stabilizes:

Error Code: 500.002.1001
Message: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

We are monitoring the situation closely and will provide updates once the service becomes stable.

For direct enquiry on the issue reach out directly to safaricom here apisupport@safaricom.co.ke
